query:
SELECT pp.projectId, pp.subcategory, COUNT(*) as count, p.name as projectName
FROM projectPhotos pp 
JOIN projects p ON pp.projectId = p.id 
WHERE pp.subcategory IN ('renders', 'modelado')
GROUP BY pp.projectId, pp.subcategory, p.name;
command:
